title: Better Water
description: Essential resource pack that changes color of water, and brings back old splashing sounds.
body:
Better Water


I was tired of how does the water look on java, and missed old sounds as well,
so I decided to make resource pack and share it with the world.
I hope you'll like it.

resource pack available from version 1.14 up to 1.19.2

Icon by: Store_Icon
